Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aaron F. MacLeitch of Haapala Altura Thompson and Abern, LLP, 510-763-2324, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Michael Hull, 512-9865, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Joel Liberson of Liberson & Wolford, LLP, 677-4110, appearing for plaintiffs and responding parties

Argued and the Court took DEFENDANTS ANA CABRERA AND CESAR CABRERA'S Special Motion To Strike Indicated Causes Of Action As A Meritless Slapp Pursuant To CCP 425.16 under submission. Each side to submit proposed forms of orders for the Court's consideration. (301/REQ/jf) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR# 2647

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aaron F. MacLeitch of Haapala Altura Thompson and Abern, LLP, 510-763-2324, appearing for defendants and responding parties
Michael Hull, 512-9865, appearing for defendants and responding parties
Joel Liberson of Liberson & Wolford, LLP, 677-4110, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS ARTURO MARIN and JOSEFINA MARIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE is denied for failure to show how the conduct in Causes of Action 1, 3, 4 and 5 arise from Defendant's protected activity. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/REQ/jf) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR# 2647
